name: Rolex Skeleton Gold Automatic
description: Luxury skeleton automatic timepiece featuring a gold-tone bezel and visible mechanical movement. Built for those who want elite style with everyday wear.

name: Jacob & Co CR7 Edition Skeleton
description: Bold sporty luxury design with vibrant strap options and skeleton dial styling. Inspired by high-performance aesthetics with a premium finish.

name: Cartier Chronograph Leather Edition
description: Elegant chronograph watch with leather strap and premium dial finish. Designed for a refined, classic look with functional timekeeping features and luxury appeal.
